message:
bd-3bxhj.5.6: Backend capability probing and fallback resolution for terminal features

Adds backend_capability module with environment-based detection, platform
defaults, user config overrides, and deterministic fallback resolution for
18 terminal capabilities. Includes migration-readiness check and 18 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
